summary: Bulk Create Action Plans for Locations
description:
Creates multiple Action Plans from a single Action Plan Template at a specified location. The endpoint enqueues background jobs to create the specified number of Action Plans asynchronously.

The template must be in "published" status. Templates in "draft" or "in_revision" status cannot be used to create plans.

Each Action Plan will be created with all sections, items, assignees, references, and test record requests copied from the template.

202.description: Accepted - Background jobs have been enqueued to create the Action Plans

404.description: Not Found - Template does not exist

409.description: Conflict - Template is in revision and cannot be used

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - No template selected, no location selected, template not published, invalid location, or invalid number_of_plans

template_id.description: The ID of the Action Plan Template to create plans from

location_id.description: The ID of the Location where the Action Plans will be created

number_of_plans.description: The number of Action Plans to create (1-1000)
